flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 29% at University of Redlands vs the 2004–2008 baseline (2.1k vs 2.9k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Redlands rose 23% between 2007 and 2010 ($11.8k → $14.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Redlands rose 16% between 2007 and 2010 ($30.6k → $35.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Redlands rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($54.1k → $60.9k).
